packet_note: Clerk operations received this packet after the mixed misdemeanor docket and financial review queue. The local export was produced before the hearing desk finished reconciling counsel and ledger data.

bench_and_review_notes.note: Prior sentence review only. The probation-active disposition from 2024-06-12 remains in place. No new judgment, restitution, or financial event was pronounced.

The bench recalled the warrant. Plea was not entered and the matter remains open for a later setting. No conviction, deferred adjudication, dismissal, restitution, or probation order was entered today.
Closed disposition from 2025-07-22 remains. No restitution was ordered and no probation setup fee was pronounced. The review is for counsel type and assessment cleanup only.
Deferred disposition from 2025-09-22 remains. No conviction was entered. The non-deferred felony counts were dismissed, no restitution was ordered, and no probation setup fee was pronounced.

Guilty plea and sentencing on 2026-06-18. CHG-001 was convicted on the amended misdemeanor criminal mischief count. CHG-002 was dismissed. Probation was ordered for 12 months. No restitution and no separate probation setup fee were pronounced.

counsel_confirmations.confirmation_note: Matches the live case representation for this review.
Written confirmation filed for retained representation at the warrant recall.
Court appointment order controls the counsel type for the closed matter.
Appointment continued after former counsel withdrew.
Matches the live case representation for the new disposition.

finance_request.amount_basis: Report final approved principal before payments and the delta from the current live ledger principal_amount.
finance_request.zero_ledger_instruction: If the live environment has no financial obligation for a target case, treat current live principal as 0.00.
finance_request.fee_code_instruction: Use Marion criminal fee schedule rows for the relevant filing or disposition dates. Use only fee codes supported by the schedule and by the hearing or review note.
